subcodes.first_line: Exalted art Thou, O my God, and sanctified art Thou, O my Refuge and my Support! Thou hast brought all created things into being through consummate wisdom in Thy celestial Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالیت یا الهی و تقدست یا ملجای و منائی قد ابدعت الاشیاء بحکمه بالغه فی ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for protection, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
